description_long: This is a two-story stone house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge that forms a square boundary around the property. The exterior walls are constructed from light gray stone blocks, and the house features a flat roof with a decorative cornice running along the top edge. The front facade has a main entry door accessed by a short stone path and flanked by symmetrically arranged windows with dark frames. A small stone well with a wooden roof is situated in the front yard, adding a traditional touch to the landscape. The windows are evenly distributed on all sides, and the property is set on a grassy plot with a clear, organized layout.
description: A two-story stone house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a hedge-enclosed yard featuring a stone well.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, symmetrical windows, stone path, and a well in the yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, hedge boundary, and the well partially visible behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, hedge enclosure, and the well clearly visible to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window, the stone path leading to the entry, and the well in the foreground.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with stone steps, no porch, and a straight stone path leading from the hedge opening.
